name: Watchless
icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2" stroke="#2563EB" stroke-width="1.7"/><path d="m10 9 5 3-5 3V9Z" fill="#2563EB"/><path d="M3 17h18" stroke="#2563EB" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

zh-CN.name: Watchless
zh-CN.shortDesc: 把视频转成以关键帧截图为主线的完整视觉文档：转写为事实来源、截图保留画面证据，输出 HTML/PDF/ZIP，读者无需再看原视频

en-US.name: Watchless
en-US.shortDesc: Turns a video into a complete keyframe-led visual document with faithful transcript-based notes, exported as HTML, PDF or a shareable ZIP
